query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, c.name as current_category
FROM establishments e 
JOIN categories c ON e.categoryId = c.id 
WHERE (e.name LIKE '%music%' OR e.name LIKE '%Music%' OR e.name LIKE '%ao vivo%' OR e.name LIKE '%karaok%')
  AND c.id != 12
GROUP BY c.name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, c.name as current_category
FROM establishments e 
JOIN categories c ON e.categoryId = c.id 
WHERE (e.name LIKE '%music%' OR e.name LIKE '%Music%' OR e.name LIKE '%ao vivo%' OR e.name LIKE '%karaok%')
  AND c.id != 12
GROUP BY c.name;
